comment.body: Since the JPM collar is deep ITM it has to be fully hedged at this point which means dealers are short a ton of SPX futures. On expiry do they buy those have to get bought back? Wouldn't this cause a blowoff top or something to that effect?

comment.body:
i like to see a well defined range with a steeper speed profile into any direction.
bcs then the price can pingpong within.
steeper speed profile can complicate the gamma hedging mechanisms so there are more chance to repell the price at any side. 

also, for swings, it is the long fly patter (long wings, shrot centre)
